/usr/bin/g++ -Wl,-O2 -Wl,--sort-common -Wl,--as-needed -Wl,-z,relro -Wl,-z,now -Wl,--disable-new-dtags -Wl,--gc-sections -Wl,--allow-shlib-undefined -Wl,-rpath,/home/wzy/anaconda3/envs/cuda_cpp/lib -Wl,-rpath-link,/home/wzy/anaconda3/envs/cuda_cpp/lib -L/home/wzy/anaconda3/envs/cuda_cpp/lib @CMakeFiles/mcrt_sim.dir/objects1.rsp CMakeFiles/mcrt_sim.dir/cmake_device_link.o -o mcrt_sim @CMakeFiles/mcrt_sim.dir/linkLibs.rsp -L"/usr/local/cuda/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/stubs" -L"/usr/local/cuda/targets/x86_64-linux/lib"
